# CommerceQA Project Setup Checklist

## Project Overview
CommerceQA is a modern, full-featured e-commerce web application built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and React Router. It's designed as a portfolio project for QA testing, providing realistic shopping functionality without backend dependencies.

**Tech Stack:** React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS + React Router v6 + TypeScript

---

## Setup Checklist

- [x] **Verify copilot-instructions.md** - Created in .github directory
- [ ] **Scaffold the Project** - Create React + Vite project structure with TypeScript
- [ ] **Customize the Project** - Add components, pages, hooks, utilities, and data files
- [ ] **Install Required Extensions** - Install recommended VS Code extensions
- [ ] **Compile the Project** - Install dependencies and verify build
- [ ] **Create and Run Task** - Set up dev server task
- [ ] **Launch the Project** - Start development server
- [ ] **Ensure Documentation is Complete** - Finalize README.md

---

## Notes
- No backend or authentication server required
- All data stored in localStorage and JSON files
- Focus on realistic UI/UX for QA testing scenarios
- Production-quality React code with clear comments
